calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Apr-03-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Simon for and with Gertrudes Goddard

The Court noted that the deadline to file objections has expired. Mr. Simon stated that the dispute has been resolved by a mutual release, and provided a proposed order in open court. The Court granted The Petition for Spousal Property (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Mar-06-2018 Continued To Apr-03-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Greg Goddard in Propria Persona (brother/objector)

Mr. Goddard stated he objected to granting of petition and requested a continuance so he can retain counsel and file his objection. The Court recalls the pre-granted order and sets March 28, 2018 as the deadline to file objections. The Petition for Spousal Property is continued to April 3, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: S. Le, C. Blackstone. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
